name: Lord Baltimore Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill
Cook sugar, water, and cream of tartar in a heavy saucepan until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (238°F on a candy thermometer).
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Slowly add the sugar mixture to the egg whites in a steady stream, beating constantly.
Mix in vanilla extract, lemon extract, and orange juice. Divide the mixture in half.
To one half of the frosting, add mixed candied fruits, toasted almonds (sliced), pecans (chopped), and macaroon crumbs.
Spread between cake layers. Use the remaining icing to cover the top and sides of the cake.
